description: The Interaction Handler component is used to control and handle the user interactions like grabbing, tooltips, and all general controls for the user regarding their hands.

fields.LocomotionController: The locomotion controller the user is using
fields.GrabSmoothing: How much to smooth grabbing interactions
fields._streamDriver: The stream providing info from the user regarding interaction using hands.
fields._undoItem: The context menu item used to undo actions for this user.
fields._redoItem: The context menu item used to redo actions for this user.
fields.ContextMenu: The context menu for the user.
fields.EquippingEnabled: Whether the user can equip stuff.
fields.MenuEnabled: Whether the user can use their menu.
fields.UserScalingEnabled: Whether the user can scale themselves.
fields.VisualEnabled: Whether the user's visual is enabled.
fields.PointingGrab: Whether the user is grabbing with this hand via the pointer. (remote grabbing)
fields.PointingTouch: Whether the user is physical grabbing with this hand.
fields._toolRoot: The root of the tool equipped to this hand currently.
fields._laserSlot: The laser object slot of this hand.
fields._laserPosition: The laser position of this hand.
fields._laserRotation: The laser rotation of this hand.
fields._interactionLaser: The interaction laser component of this hand.
fields._laserEnabled: Whether the user's laser is enabled for this hand.
fields._handGrabType: The hand grab type being used for this hand.
fields._grabToggle: Whether the user's grabbing is enabled for this hand.
fields._holderPos: The holder position field for this hand.
fields._holderRot: The holder rotation field for this hand.
fields._laserRotationType: The rotation type for this hand's laser.
fields._holderAxisOffset: The holder axis offset for this hand.
fields._holderRotationOffset: The holder rotation offset for this hand. used for laser rotation.
fields._holderRotationReference: the reference value for the holder rotation for this hand. used for laser rotation.
fields._originalTwistOffset: the original twist value for this holder. used for laser rotation.
fields.ToolHolder: The slot that holds tooltips for this hand.
fields.ShowInteractionHints: Whether to show tooltip interaction hints for this hand for the user.
fields._grabberSphereActive: The field to drive with whether the grab sphere visual should be visible.
fields._grabIgnoreRoot: The slot which to ignore grabbable objects for this hand.
fields._grabber: The grabber component for this hand to handle grabbing objects.
fields._currentGrabType: The current grab type selected for this hand.
fields.ActiveToolLink: The link that references to the active tool for this hand. Points to the ``_equipLink`` on the equipped tool for this hand.
fields._activeToolGripPoseReference: The grip pose reference to use for positioning the active tool for the user in this hand.
fields._toolLocked: Whether the tool is equipped and locked into place.
fields._grabMaterial: The material used for the grab sphere visual for this hand.
fields._itemShelfSlot: The slot for the current item shelf on the user.
fields._itemShelf: The component for the current item shelf on the user.

methods.Dequip: The button handler for dequipping a tool on this hand.
methods.EquipGrabbed: The handler for equipping a grabbed tool on this hand.
methods.OpenLocomotionMenu: The handler for opening the locomotion on this hand via the menu.
methods.OpenGrabbingMenu: The handler for opening the grabbing options on this hand via the menu.
methods.OpenHandGrabMenu: The handler for opening the hand grabbing options on this hand via the menu.
methods.SetLocomotion: The handler for setting the active locomotion on this hand via the menu.
methods.SetGrabType: The handler for setting the hand grab type on this hand via the menu.
methods.DestroyGrabbed: The handler for destroying the grabbed objects on this hand via the menu.
methods.DuplicateGrabbed: The handler for duplicating the grabbed objects on this hand via the menu.
methods.SaveGrabbed: The handler for saving the grabbed objects on this hand via the menu.
methods.Undo: The handler for redoing an action via the menu on this hand.
methods.Redo: The handler for undoing an action via the menu on this hand.
methods.ResetUserScale: The handler for resetting the user's scale via the menu on this hand.
methods.OnStraighten: The handler for straightening the grabbed object to the closest vertical axis on this hand.
methods.OnRotateUp: The handler for rotating the grabbed object to the up direction on this hand,
methods.OnRotateRight: The handler for rotating the grabbed object to the right direction on this hand,
methods.OnRotateForward: The handler for rotating the grabbed object to the forward direction on this hand,
methods.OnRotateUnconstrained: The handler for rotating the grabbed object on this hand,

notes.title: HandGrabType
notes.text: used when InteractionHandler.GrabType is set to "Hand"
